test_description: Convert a simple lookup table (no geography/temporal/memory-optimized features) DDL to Delta.
expected_result: Generated CREATE TABLE matches column count/order/nullability of source; classified LIFT_AND_SHIFT with no manual-review flags raised.

test_description: Convert a table with geography column + temporal system-versioning to Delta.
expected_result: Geography column mapped to STRING with explicit review flag; system-versioning columns dropped with a point-in-time-filter rewrite note (not a Time Travel equivalence claim); no silent data loss.

test_description: Convert a Gold fact table DDL, confirming partition/clustering recommendation is present.
expected_result: DDL includes a TODO partition marker (PARTITIONED BY date key) consistent with target_state_architecture.md's file-layout recommendation.

test_description: Translate a simple single-table SELECT view.
expected_result: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW produced with bracket identifiers converted to backticks; no warnings.

test_description: Translate a view using FOR JSON (no Spark SQL equivalent).
expected_result: View routed to review_required with an explicit FOR JSON -> to_json(struct(...)) rewrite note; conversion NOT silently approximated.

scenario: Stored proc with set-based SQL only
test_description: Convert a staging-to-DW migration procedure with no CURSOR/WHILE/dynamic SQL.
expected_result: Procedure converted to Databricks SQL only (no PySpark stub generated); core DML preserved.

test_description: Convert a CURSOR/WHILE-driven change-detection procedure, orchestration-heavy.
expected_result: Procedure split per rule 4 into a SQL transformation file and a PySpark orchestration file; both routed to review_required with CURSOR/WHILE/temp-table factors listed.

test_description: Convert a scalar function with multiple DECLARE statements and business-rule branching.
expected_result: Function routed to review_required (procedural body) rather than silently emitted as an incomplete SQL UDF; PySpark stub generated with original body preserved as comment.

test_description: Convert an inline TVF that calls IS_ROLEMEMBER (security-context-dependent logic).
expected_result: Routed to PySpark stub with explicit warning that Unity Catalog row/column-level security must replace the SQL Server role-membership check — not auto-translated.

test_description: Validate end-to-end City dimension load: staging -> SCD2 MERGE -> Silver table.
expected_result: New and changed source rows produce correctly versioned Valid From/Valid To rows; no duplicate 'current' rows per natural key.

test_description: Validate Sale fact load resolves all dimension foreign keys correctly after Dimension loads complete.
expected_result: Zero orphaned fact rows (every dimension key resolves); row count matches expected daily volume +/- tolerance.

test_description: Validate the 4-task City Dimension chain (Truncate -> Cutoff -> Extract -> Migrate) preserves SSIS's precedence-constraint order as Workflow depends_on.
expected_result: Workflow task graph topologically matches the original SSIS precedence constraints; no task starts before its SSIS-defined predecessor completes.

test_description: Validate the full package-level job (81 tasks) runs to completion in dependency order.
expected_result: Full job run completes with all 13 entity chains finishing; job-level run history shows no out-of-order task starts.

object_id: SSIS:DailyETLMain:Extract Updated City Data to Staging
test_description: Validate the OLE DB Source (EXEC GetCityUpdates) -> Destination data flow converts to a single JDBC-read-then-Delta-write PySpark task with no in-pipeline transforms lost.
expected_result: Row count and column values in the Bronze staging Delta table match the SQL Server source query result for the same watermark window.

test_description: Validate the watermark read at the start of an entity load returns the correct prior cutoff.
expected_result: Watermark read returns the exact value written by the previous successful run's advance step.

test_description: Validate the Python translation of the SSIS expression DATEADD("Minute",-5,GETUTCDATE()) (5-minute safety buffer for in-flight transactions).
expected_result: Computed cutoff is always exactly 5 minutes behind UTC now, across DST boundaries.

test_description: Validate first-run behaviour when ops.etl_watermark has no prior row for an entity.
expected_result: Pipeline performs a full initial load and writes an initial watermark row, rather than failing or silently skipping all rows.

test_description: Simulate a mid-run failure in a MERGE task (e.g. Migrate Staged City Data) and re-run using Databricks Workflows' repair-run feature.
expected_result: Repaired run produces an identical end-state to a clean run with no duplicate or missing rows — confirms idempotency of overwrite/MERGE-based tasks replacing SSIS checkpoint restart.

test_description: Validate re-running the staging overwrite step twice in a row is safe.
expected_result: Second run produces the same staging table contents as the first (idempotent overwrite).

test_description: Validate all 6 Fact tables' MERGE tasks only run after their corresponding Dimension tables' loads complete (per dependencies.json topological order).
expected_result: No Fact load task starts before all Dimension tables it references have completed in the same run; topological_order from dependencies.json is preserved in the deployed job graph.

test_description: Validate a 0-upstream-dependency fact table (Fact.Movement) is not blocked by an unnecessary dependency edge introduced during conversion.
expected_result: Fact.Movement's converted job task has no spurious depends_on entries beyond its actual source data flow.

test_description: Confirm the conversion layer detects and flags FOR JSON rather than emitting broken SQL.
expected_result: Object appears in conversion_manifest.json with needs_review=true and in output/review_required/; equivalent entry exists in manual_intervention_list.md from the impact-analysis step.

test_description: Confirm Foreach Loop containers, flat-file connections, and event handlers — none present in this package — would be correctly flagged as unsupported-but-documented if encountered.
expected_result: unsupported_ssis_features.md explicitly lists the mapping rule for each feature even though zero instances exist in this source corpus (verified via raw DTSX inspection: 0 EventHandler elements, 0 ForEach containers, 0 Flat File connection managers).

test_description: Run generate_target_state_design() with architecture_override='data_vault' and confirm the decision is recorded and propagated rather than silently ignored.
expected_result: target_state_mappings.json's architecture_decision.chosen_architecture == 'data_vault' and is_default == False, while evaluated_alternatives still documents why medallion was the default.
